title: AvM Beeper
description: This resource pack changes bee's texture to Beeper from Animation vs Minecraft Ep 33
body:
As the short desc said, "This resource pack changes bee's texture to Beeper from Animation vs Minecraft Ep 33". If the RP gets enough appreciation, I will add an Optifine function of getting this texture through renaming the bee. And sounds, maybe. I don't know I never touched sfx production.

The idea and reference were taken from Alan Becker, the animator of these series.

Watch the episode here: [Click](<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vlVUVsx6BYY>)
